description: CompositionBlack cap made of 100% cotton that has a lining made of 100% cotton, metal clasp closure at the back, Ducati embroidered on the front with background print in black , Ducati badge on the back, red piping along the edge of the vizor and cat logo on the vizor Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Do not wring Stretch to original shape while damp Get ready to bring out the racing demon in you with this Ducati cap from puma. The bold embroidered Ducati brand name and sleek styling makes this  one coveted cap. Team it with your sporting clothes or casuals when you go out in the sun and carry the Ducati spirit wherever you go.
